title: Health Policy Analyst
description:
Roche is a global healthcare leader in diagnostics and pharmaceuticals. We're committed to advancing personalized healthcare across all therapeutic areas.

We're seeking a Health Policy Analyst to join our Pharmaceuticals team in Sacramento. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Research healthcare policy developments and regulatory changes affecting pharmaceutical market access
Analyze health economic data to inform evidence-based policy recommendations
Prepare policy briefs and white papers for stakeholder communication
Monitor legislative and regulatory activities across federal and state levels
Collaborate with external policy consultants and healthcare organizations
Support payer and provider relationship management with policy insights

requirements.education: Master's degree in Public Health, Health Policy, or related field preferred; Bachelor's required
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in healthcare policy, health economics, or pharma regulatory affairs
certifications: None required; CMS or FDA knowledge a plus
